AuthEnty.affiliation: Ministry of Statistics & P.I, Govt. of India

prodStmt.copyright: Ministry of Statistics & P.I, Govt. of India

AuthEnty.affiliation: Ministry of Statistics & P.I, Govt. of India

subject.keyword: BLOCK-I (INPUT ITEMS - Directly imported items only (consumed))
BLOCK-J (PRODUCTS AND BY-PRODUCTS (Manufactured by the unit))

stdyInfo.abstract: Annual Survey of Industries (ASI) is the principal source of industrial statistics in India. It provides statistical information to assess and evaluate, objectively and realistically, the changes in the growth, composition and structure of organized manufacturing sector comprising activities related to manufacturing processes, repair services, gas and water supply and cold storage. The survey has so far been conducted annually under the statutory provisions of the Collection of Statistics (COS) Act, 1953 and the rules framed there-under in 1959 except in the State of Jammu & Kashmir where it is conducted under the J&K Collection of Statistics Act, 1961 and rules framed there under in 1964. From ASI 2010-11 onwards, the survey is being conducted annually under the statutory provisions of the Collection of Statistics (COS) Act, 2008 (as amended in 2017) and the rules framed there-under in 2011.

sumDscr.geogCover: The ASI extends its coverage to the entire country upto state level.
sumDscr.anlyUnit: The primary unit of enumeration in the survey is a factory in the case of manufacturing industries, a workshop in the case of repair services, an undertaking or a licensee in the case of electricity, gas and water supply undertakings and an establishment in the case of bidi and cigar industries. The owner of two or more establishments located in the same state, same sector (bidi, factory or electricity) and pertaining to the same industry group (3-digit industry code) falling under the census scheme is, however, permitted to furnish a single consolidated return, termed as 'Joint Return (JR)'. Such consolidated returns are a common feature in the case of bidi and cigar establishments & electricity undertakings.

dataColl.weight: Multiplier is the weighing variable from Block A : Identification Block.

var.name: a4
var.labl: Ind. Code as per Frame (4-digit Class of NIC-2008)

var.name: a5
var.labl: Ind Code as per Return (5-digit Sub-class of NIC-2008)

var.name: pf
var.labl: Contribution to provident & other funds (in Rs.)

var.name: mwdays
var.labl: Number of working days ( Manufacturing days)

var.name: b04
var.labl: Whether the unit has ISO Certification, 14000 Series

var.name: b08
var.labl: Whether the share capital of the company includes share of foreign entities? (Yes-1, No-2)

var.name: b09
var.labl: Any R&D unit in your factory? (yes & registered with DST/DBT-1, yes & registered with others-2, no-3)

var.name: b11
var.labl: Whether the unit offered any formal training (Yes-1, No-2)

var.name: c_11
var.labl: S. No. (to be entered as printed in the schedule)

var.name: c_14
var.labl: Gross Value of Addition due to Revaluation

var.name: c_16
var.labl: Gross Value of Deduction & adjustment during the year

var.name: c_110
var.labl: Depreciation due to Adjustment for sold/ discarded during the year

var.name: d11
var.labl: S. No. (to be entered as printed in the schedule)

var.name: E11
var.labl: S. No. (to be entered as printed in the schedule)

var.name: F1
var.labl: Work done by others on materials supplied by the industrial undertaking

var.name: F2A
var.labl: Repair & maintenance of Building & Other construction

var.name: F2B
var.labl: Repair & maintenance of Other fixed assets

var.name: F4
var.labl: Expenses on raw materials and other components for own construction

var.name: F6
var.labl: Rent paid for Plant & Machinery and other Fixed assets

var.name: F9
var.labl: Rent paid for land on lease or royalties on mines, quarries and similar assets

var.name: F11
var.labl: Purchase value of goods sold in the same condition as purchased

var.name: G1
var.labl: Receipts from manufacturing services (including work done for others on materials supplied by them and sale value of waste left by the party)

var.name: G2
var.labl: Receipts from non-manufacturing services (including non-industrial services)

var.name: G3
var.labl: Value in electricity generated and sold.

var.name: G5
var.labl: Net balance of goods sold in the same condition as purchased

var.name: G6
var.labl: Rent received for Plant & Machinery and other fixed assets

var.name: G7
var.labl: Variation in stock of semi-finished goods

var.name: G9
var.labl: Rent received for land on lease or royalties on mines, quarries and similar assets

var.name: G11
var.labl: Sale value of goods sold in the same condition as purchased

var.name: H11
var.labl: S. No. (to be entered as printed in the schedule)

var.name: I11
var.labl: S. No. (to be entered as printed in the schedule)

var.name: J11
var.labl: S. No. (to be entered as printed in the schedule)

var.name: J19
var.labl: Excise Duty/ Sales Tax/VAT/ Other Taxes, ifany (Rs.)
